creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
(In reply to Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #3)

This is very good news! I am trying to get that fixed in wolfSSL for consistency reasons, but it is hard to argue with maintainers: https://github.com/curl/curl/pull/11934

You can pull in my patch for the time being and all three providers will use what certctl(8) sets up.
